description: A static HTML+JS surface that projects WhitepaperApp UDT instances into the browser. The renderer reads the same papers.json the Android umbrella bundles (one source of truth, three outputs), renders a landing grid + per-paper detail page, and hot-loads JS mini ports when present. Think of it as the web-side mirror of phone/whitepapers/_umbrella.

route.description: repo-relative path served by GitHub Pages

source.description: relative path to the papers.json it reads

minis_dir.description: dir under the route that holds JS mini ports; fallbacks to Kotlin-source link when no module for slug
